channel.title: Versions on Notities
channel.description: Recent content in Versions on Notities

item.title: Multiple versions of Java on macOS
item.description:
$ ls -al /usr/local/opt/ | grep -i openjdk

$ brew install jenv

$ jenv add /Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/openjdk-17.jdk/Contents/Home/

$ jenv versions
$ jenv local 1.8
$ java -version
$ jenv global 1.8
$ java -version
$ jenv shell 1.8
$ java -version
$ jenv versions
